build.beforeDevCommand: node -e "const { existsSync } = require('node:fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const dir = existsSync('ui/package.json') ? 'ui' : '../ui'; const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npm.cmd' : 'npm'; const result = spawnSync(cmd, ['--prefix', dir, 'run', 'dev'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
build.beforeBuildCommand: node -e "const { existsSync } = require('node:fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const dir = existsSync('ui/package.json') ? 'ui' : '../ui'; const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npm.cmd' : 'npm'; const result = spawnSync(cmd, ['--prefix', dir, 'run', 'build'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
